answers: Start with basic poses: Mountain, Downward Dog, Warrior I & II, Child's Pose, and Cobra. Just 15 minutes daily makes a big difference!
Yoga benefits: improved flexibility, reduced stress, better posture, stronger core, mental clarity, and better sleep. Good for body and mind!
Beginner tip: don't compare yourself to others. Yoga is about YOUR body and YOUR progress. Use a mat, wear comfortable clothes, and breathe deeply.
Follow YouTube channels like Yoga With Adriene for free guided sessions. Start with 10-15 minute beginner flows and build up gradually.
